sourceMovie.title: Fight or Flight
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Fight or Flight for the same reason it broke through in 2025: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a comedy rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. James Madigan keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The action and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Hidden Strike
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Fight or Flight clicked for you, Hidden Strike (2023) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Fight or Flight?
faq.answer: Try Hidden Strike, In Order of Disappearance, The Killer's Game—each shares DNA with Fight or Flight while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Fight or Flight?
faq.answer: Fight or Flight (2025) is best described as Action, Comedy, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Fight or Flight worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
